name: aiwithabidi--skill-auditor-v2
description: Security scanner for OpenClaw skills. Detects malicious code, obfuscated payloads, prompt injection, social engineering, typosquatting, and data exfiltration before installation. Features 0-100 numeric risk scoring, MITRE ATT&CK mappings, base64/hex deobfuscation, IoC database, whitelist system, and SHA256 file inventory. Use before installing any third-party skill. Triggers: audit skill, check security, scan skill, is this skill safe, security review, quarantine.
